subject: RewardSigil
adopted_concept: Reward, shortcut, and boss weak-point sigils for readable compact action-adventure feedback.

asset_request.source: inferred because no visual asset_request.yaml was present in the checkout
out_of_scope_asset_requests: artifacts/Reports/SFXPack_v0_1_0/asset_request.yaml is an SFX Session request and was not used for this visual asset family.
asset_request.usage_context: FOURFOLD ECHOES reward reveal, relic pickup, shortcut open, and boss weak-point readback

prompt_contract:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: Unity UI icon family plus 3D material atlas maps
Primary request: compact FOURFOLD ECHOES reward and weak-point sigils, no text, no background
Style/medium: procedural 2D raster icon, folded reliquary miniature product line
Subject: four small reward/weak-point sigils built from folded slabs, chunky tabs, fourfold inlays, and one functional signal socket
Composition/framing: centered silhouette, transparent padding, readable at 64px, 128px, and 256px
Color palette: ivory stone, warm gold, cool route blue, root green, ember orange, restrained weak red
Materials/textures: broad stylized PBR planes, sparse bevel-like normal detail, no photoreal grime, no noisy fantasy texture
Constraints: transparent PNG, no labels, no letters, no background plate, no cast shadow, variations differ by outline, socket, weak-point shape, material temperature, and signal placement
Avoid: generic treasure chest icon, inventory bag, keyhole text, quest marker, external IP style names, fine decorative clutter, watermark

unity_import.texture_type: Sprite (2D and UI) for individual icons; Default/Normal Map for atlas maps as needed

texture_maps.Mask_channels: R=silhouette/occlusion, G=material roughness group, B=emissive mask, A=alpha

variants.name: Root
variants.difference: rounded root-leaf socket and green reward signal

variants.name: Ember
variants.difference: warm seed/flame socket and amber lower slab

variants.name: BossWeak
variants.difference: red diamond weak socket, cracked center, cross read

variants.name: Shortcut
variants.difference: opened latch silhouette and cool route signal

qc.edge_bleed: none detected in alpha-corner and edge checks after inset pass
qc.tile_seam: not applicable; icons and atlas, not loop tiles
